title: Warum Hans Wagner den Sternenhimmel hasst
original_title: Warum Hans Wagner den Sternenhimmel hasst
overview: Hans Wagner lives in a small apartment, taking pills and drinking whiskey to fight his anxiety disorders. When he runs out of both his drugs one day, he has no choice but travel to the supermarket sober. An unexpected adventure begins .
